requirement_topic.en: EOS Standards and GOEIC Import Conformity Route
requirement_topic.zh: EOS 标准与 GOEIC 进口合格评定路径
requirement_topic.zht: EOS 標準與 GOEIC 進口合格評定路徑

summary.en: Egyptian import clearance for industrial goods can involve GOEIC services such as industrial imports, accredited tests and laboratories, import approvals, and issuance of conformity certificates. For a solar PV inverter, the importer should confirm the applicable Egyptian Standard with EOS and the GOEIC inspection or conformity route for the actual HS code, model, and shipment.
summary.zh: 埃及工业品进口放行可能涉及 GOEIC 的工业进口、认可测试与实验室、进口审批及合格证书签发等服务。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，进口商应按实际 HS 编码、型号和批次向 EOS 确认适用埃及标准，并向 GOEIC 确认检验或合格评定路径。
summary.zht: 埃及工業品進口放行可能涉及 GOEIC 的工業進口、認可測試與實驗室、進口審批及合格證書簽發等服務。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，進口商應按實際 HS 編碼、型號和批次向 EOS 確認適用埃及標準，並向 GOEIC 確認檢驗或合格評定路徑。

standards_or_laws: GOEIC conformity certificates and import approvals

summary.en: China-origin files often include GB/T inverter reports, CQC or CGC certificates, CB reports, factory ISO certificates, and Chinese labels. These can support Egyptian review but do not replace an EOS standard check or GOEIC import-conformity decision.
summary.zh: 中国产文件通常包括 GB/T 逆变器报告、CQC 或 CGC 证书、CB 报告、工厂 ISO 证书和中文标签。这些资料可支持埃及审查，但不能替代 EOS 标准核验或 GOEIC 进口合格评定决定。
summary.zht: 中國產文件通常包括 GB/T 逆變器報告、CQC 或 CGC 證書、CB 報告、工廠 ISO 證書和中文標籤。這些資料可支持埃及審查，但不能替代 EOS 標準核驗或 GOEIC 進口合格評定決定。

gap.en: The gap is an import-route determination, not just a test-report gap. Before shipment, align HS classification, commercial invoice, model list, certificates, test reports, label language, and any inspection booking with the Egyptian importer and GOEIC route.
gap.zh: 差距在于进口路径判定，而不仅是测试报告差距。出货前，应与埃及进口商及 GOEIC 路径核对 HS 归类、商业发票、型号清单、证书、测试报告、标签语言和任何检验预约。
gap.zht: 差距在於進口路徑判定，而不僅是測試報告差距。出貨前，應與埃及進口商及 GOEIC 路徑核對 HS 歸類、商業發票、型號清單、證書、測試報告、標籤語言和任何檢驗預約。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where GOEIC import inspection, import approval, or conformity certificate is required for the shipment; no universal whole-unit PV-inverter mandatory certification is claimed here without a shipment-specific GOEIC/EOS determination
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project/customer driven for many GB/T, CQC, CGC, and CB documents unless required by contract or Chinese project approval

source.publisher: General Organization for Export and Import Control (GOEIC), Egypt

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GOEIC/EOS as a shipment and standard-scope gate. China certificates are supporting evidence, not an Egyptian import release by themselves.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 GOEIC/EOS 视为批次和标准适用范围门槛。中国证书只是支持性证据，本身不等于埃及进口放行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 GOEIC/EOS 視為批次和標準適用範圍門檻。中國證書只是支持性證據，本身不等於埃及進口放行。
